prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Island). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document specifically addresses the management of Protected Landscapes which include National Parks and Areas of Outstanding Natural Beauty (AONB) in England. The guidance outlines legal frameworks and protocols that pertain exclusively to these designated areas within England's jurisdiction.
